name: MoWITTWindward
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcMoWITTWindward(Real64 const DeltaTemp, Real64 const WindAtZ){ Real64 Hn = 0.84 * std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp), 1.0/3.0); Real64 Hf = 3.26 * std::pow(WindAtZ, 0.89); return std::sqrt(pow_2(Hn) + pow_2(Hf)); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ double d[]={3.0,8.0}; double w[]={2.0,5.5}; for(int i=0;i<2;i++) printf("%.10g\n", CalcMoWITTWindward(d[i],w[i])); return 0; }

name: DOE2Forced
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcDOE2Forced(Real64 const DeltaTemp, Real64 const WindAtZ, Real64 const RoughMult){ Real64 Hn = 1.31 * std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp), 1.0/3.0); Real64 Hcglass = std::sqrt(pow_2(Hn) + pow_2(3.26 * std::pow(WindAtZ, 0.89))); return Hn + RoughMult * (Hcglass - Hn); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ double d[]={4.0,6.0}; double w[]={3.0,4.0}; double r[]={1.67,2.10}; for(int i=0;i<2;i++) printf("%.10g\n", CalcDOE2Forced(d[i],w[i],r[i])); return 0; }

name: NusseltJurges
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcNusseltJurges(Real64 const WindAtZ){ Real64 Hc; if (WindAtZ <= 5.0) { Hc = 5.8 + 3.94 * WindAtZ; } else { Hc = 7.2 * std::pow(WindAtZ, 0.78); } return Hc; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ double w[]={0.0,3.0,5.0,8.0,12.0}; for(double x: w) printf("%.10g\n", CalcNusseltJurges(x)); return 0; }

name: SurfaceRadExchange

name: LinearizedRadCoeff
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcLinearizedRadCoeff(Real64 const Emiss, Real64 const Tsurf, Real64 const Tother){ Real64 Ts = Tsurf + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 To = Tother + Constant::Kelvin; return Emiss * Constant::StefanBoltzmann * (pow_2(Ts) + pow_2(To)) * (Ts + To); }

name: EffectiveEmissivity

mojo_unit:
def CalcEffectiveEmissivity(E1: Real64, E2: Real64) -> Real64:
    return 1.0 / (1.0 / E1 + 1.0 / E2 - 1.0)

name: ChurchillChuNusselt
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcChurchillChuNusselt(Real64 const Ra, Real64 const Pr){ Real64 num = 0.387 * std::pow(Ra, 1.0/6.0); Real64 den = std::pow(1.0 + std::pow(0.492 / Pr, 9.0/16.0), 8.0/27.0); Real64 t = 0.825 + num / den; return pow_2(t); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ double ra[]={1.0e6,1.0e8,3.5e9}; for(double x: ra) printf("%.10g\n", CalcChurchillChuNusselt(x,0.71)); return 0; }

name: WindwardFlag
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcWindwardFlag(Real64 const WindDir, Real64 const SurfAzimuth){ Real64 Diff = mod(std::abs(WindDir - SurfAzimuth), 360.0); if (Diff > 180.0) Diff = 360.0 - Diff; Real64 Windward = sign(1.0, 100.0 - Diff); return Windward * (1.0 - Diff / 180.0); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ double wd[]={10.0,200.0,350.0}; double az[]={90.0,45.0,300.0}; for(int i=0;i<3;i++) printf("%.10g\n", CalcWindwardFlag(wd[i],az[i])); return 0; }

name: USeriesResistance
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcUValueSeries(Real64 const Hin, Real64 const Rcond, Real64 const Hout){ Real64 Rtot = 1.0 / Hin + Rcond + 1.0 / Hout; return 1.0 / Rtot; }

name: TiltBranchConvection
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcTiltBranchConvection(Real64 const DeltaTemp, Real64 const CosTilt){ Real64 Hc; if (CosTilt > 0.5) { Hc = 9.482 * std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp), 1.0/3.0) / (7.283 - std::abs(CosTilt)); } else if (CosTilt < -0.5) { Hc = 1.810 * std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp), 1.0/3.0) / (1.382 + std::abs(CosTilt)); } else { Hc = 1.31 * std::pow(std::abs(DeltaTemp), 1.0/3.0); } return Hc; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ double dt[]={5.0,5.0,5.0}; double ct[]={0.87,0.0,-0.87}; for(int i=0;i<3;i++) printf("%.10g\n", CalcTiltBranchConvection(dt[i],ct[i])); return 0; }

name: SkyRadiation
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcSkyRadiation(Real64 const Emiss, Real64 const Tair, Real64 const SkyTemp, Real64 const ViewSky){ Real64 Ta = Tair + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 Tsky = SkyTemp + Constant::Kelvin; return Emiss * Constant::StefanBoltzmann * ViewSky * (pow_4(Ta) - pow_4(Tsky)); }

def CalcFilmCoeff(Nu: Real64, Cond: Real64, Lc: Real64) -> Real64:
    return Nu * Cond / Lc

name: GrashofRayleigh
cpp_unit: Real64 CalcRayleigh(Real64 const DeltaT, Real64 const Lc, Real64 const Tfilm){ Real64 Tk = Tfilm + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 beta = 1.0 / Tk; Real64 g = 9.81; Real64 nu = 1.5e-5; Real64 alpha = 2.1e-5; Real64 Gr = g * beta * std::abs(DeltaT) * pow_3(Lc) / pow_2(nu); Real64 Pr = nu / alpha; return Gr * Pr; }
mojo_unit:
def CalcRayleigh(DeltaT: Real64, Lc: Real64, Tfilm: Real64) -> Real64:
    var Tk = Tfilm + Constant.Kelvin
    var beta = 1.0 / Tk
    var g = 9.81
    var nu = 1.5e-5
    var alpha = 2.1e-5
    var Gr = g * beta * abs(DeltaT) * pow_3(Lc) / pow_2(nu)
    var Pr = nu / alpha
    return Gr * Pr
cpp_driver: int main(){ double dt[]={5.0,10.0}; double lc[]={1.0,2.5}; for(int i=0;i<2;i++) printf("%.10g\n", CalcRayleigh(dt[i],lc[i],20.0)); return 0; }

mojo_unit:
def CurveBiquadratic(x: Real64, y: Real64) -> Real64:
    var c0 = 0.85
    var c1 = 0.012
    var c2 = -0.0004

    var c4 = -0.0002
    var c5 = 0.0001
    return c0 + c1*x + c2*pow_2(x) + c3*y + c4*pow_2(y) + c5*x*y

mojo_unit:
def FanPowerCubicPLR(FullPower: Real64, PLR: Real64) -> Real64:

name: CurveBicubic
cpp_unit: Real64 CurveBicubic(Real64 const x, Real64 const y){ static const double c0=0.7,c1=0.02,c2=-0.0003,c3=0.01,c4=-0.0001,c5=0.0002,c6=0.000005,c7=0.000003,c8=0.0000001,c9=0.0000002; return c0 + c1*x + c2*pow_2(x) + c3*y + c4*pow_2(y) + c5*x*y + c6*pow_3(x) + c7*pow_3(y) + c8*pow_2(x)*y + c9*x*pow_2(y); }
mojo_unit:
def CurveBicubic(x: Real64, y: Real64) -> Real64:
    var c0 = 0.7
    var c1 = 0.02
    var c2 = -0.0003
    var c3 = 0.01
    var c4 = -0.0001
    var c5 = 0.0002
    var c6 = 0.000005
    var c7 = 0.000003
    var c8 = 0.0000001
    var c9 = 0.0000002
    return c0 + c1*x + c2*pow_2(x) + c3*y + c4*pow_2(y) + c5*x*y + c6*pow_3(x) + c7*pow_3(y) + c8*pow_2(x)*y + c9*x*pow_2(y)

name: SatPressFromTemp
cpp_unit: Real64 SatPressFromTemp(Real64 const T){ Real64 const Tk = T + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const lnP = -5800.2206/Tk + 1.3914993 - 0.04860239*Tk + 0.41764768e-4*pow_2(Tk) - 0.14452093e-7*pow_3(Tk) + 6.5459673*std::log(Tk); return std::exp(lnP); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(0.0)); printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(20.0)); printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(37.5)); printf("%.10g
", SatPressFromTemp(-10.0)); return 0; }

name: DewPointFromVapPress
cpp_unit: Real64 DewPointFromVapPress(Real64 const Pw){ Real64 const lnPw = std::log(Pw/1000.0); Real64 Tdp; if (lnPw < 0.0) { Tdp = 6.09 + 12.608*lnPw + 0.4959*pow_2(lnPw); } else { Tdp = 6.54 + 14.526*lnPw + 0.7389*pow_2(lnPw) + 0.09486*pow_3(lnPw) + 0.4569*std::pow(Pw/1000.0, 0.1984); } return Tdp; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", DewPointFromVapPress(1200.0)); printf("%.10g
", DewPointFromVapPress(3500.0)); printf("%.10g
", DewPointFromVapPress(500.0)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(DewPointFromVapPress(1200.0))
    print(DewPointFromVapPress(3500.0))
    print(DewPointFromVapPress(500.0))

name: LogMeanTempDiff
cpp_unit: Real64 LogMeanTempDiff(Real64 const dT1, Real64 const dT2){ if (std::abs(dT1 - dT2) < 1.0e-6) return 0.5*(dT1 + dT2); return (dT1 - dT2)/std::log(dT1/dT2); }

name: NTUeffectivenessCounter
cpp_unit: Real64 NTUeffectivenessCounter(Real64 const NTU, Real64 const Cr){ if (Cr > 0.999) return NTU/(1.0 + NTU); Real64 const e = std::exp(-NTU*(1.0 - Cr)); return (1.0 - e)/(1.0 - Cr*e); }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", NTUeffectivenessCounter(1.5, 0.5)); printf("%.10g
", NTUeffectivenessCounter(2.0, 1.0)); printf("%.10g
", NTUeffectivenessCounter(0.8, 0.25)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(NTUeffectivenessCounter(1.5, 0.5))
    print(NTUeffectivenessCounter(2.0, 1.0))
    print(NTUeffectivenessCounter(0.8, 0.25))

name: FinEfficiency
cpp_unit: Real64 FinEfficiency(Real64 const h, Real64 const k, Real64 const th, Real64 const L){ Real64 const m = std::sqrt(2.0*h/(k*th)); Real64 const mL = m*L; Real64 const e = std::exp(mL); Real64 const em = std::exp(-mL); Real64 const tanhmL = (e - em)/(e + em); return tanhmL/mL; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", FinEfficiency(50.0, 200.0, 0.002, 0.05)); printf("%.10g\n", FinEfficiency(25.0, 50.0, 0.001, 0.03)); return 0; }

name: NusseltDittusBoelter
cpp_unit: Real64 NusseltDittusBoelter(Real64 const Re, Real64 const Pr, bool const heating){ Real64 const n = heating ? 0.4 : 0.3; return 0.023*std::pow(Re, 0.8)*std::pow(Pr, n); }

name: SkyTempClark
cpp_unit: Real64 SkyTempClark(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const Tdp, Real64 const opaqueFrac){ Real64 const Tk = Tdb + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const emiss = (0.787 + 0.764*std::log((Tdp + Constant::Kelvin)/273.0))*(1.0 + 0.0224*opaqueFrac); return std::pow(emiss, 0.25)*Tk - Constant::Kelvin; }

", SkyTempClark(5.0, 2.0, 1.0)); printf("%.10g
", SkyTempClark(30.0, 18.0, 0.0)); return 0; }

name: GroundTempSeasonalPoly
cpp_unit: Real64 GroundTempSeasonalPoly(Real64 const Tmean, Real64 const Tamp, Real64 const dayOfYear){ Real64 const f = mod(dayOfYear - 1.0, 365.0)/365.0; Real64 const shape = -16.0*pow_2(f)*pow_2(1.0 - f); return Tmean + Tamp*shape; }

name: WetBulbApproxPoly
cpp_unit: Real64 WetBulbApproxPoly(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const RH){ Real64 const r = RH/100.0; Real64 Twb = Tdb - (1.0 - r)*(0.55 + 0.007*Tdb)*(14.0 + 0.5*Tdb); if (Twb > Tdb) Twb = Tdb; return Twb; }

name: ThermalResistanceSeries

name: PMVThermalLoad
cpp_unit: Real64 PMVThermalLoad(Real64 const M, Real64 const Tcl, Real64 const Tr, Real64 const Ta){ Real64 const Tclk = Tcl + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const Trk = Tr + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const rad = 3.96e-8*(pow_4(Tclk) - pow_4(Trk)); Real64 const conv = 12.1*std::sqrt(0.1)*(Tcl - Ta); return (0.303*std::exp(-0.036*M) + 0.028)*(M - rad - conv); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%.10g\n", PMVThermalLoad(58.15, 28.0, 22.0, 24.0)); printf("%.10g\n", PMVThermalLoad(70.0, 30.0, 25.0, 26.0)); return 0; }

name: EnthalpyDiffClamp
cpp_unit:
Real64 MoistAirEnth2(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const W){ return 1.00484e3*Tdb + W*(2.50094e6 + 1.85895e3*Tdb); }
Real64 EnthalpyDiffClamp(Real64 const Tdb, Real64 const W){ Real64 h = MoistAirEnth2(Tdb, W); if (h < 0.0) h = 0.0; if (h > 1.0e5) h = 1.0e5; return h; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.10g
", EnthalpyDiffClamp(20.0, 0.008)); printf("%.10g
", EnthalpyDiffClamp(-50.0, 0.0)); printf("%.10g
", EnthalpyDiffClamp(40.0, 0.05)); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(EnthalpyDiffClamp(20.0, 0.008))
    print(EnthalpyDiffClamp(-50.0, 0.0))
    print(EnthalpyDiffClamp(40.0, 0.05))

name: RhoCpProduct
cpp_unit: Real64 RhoCpProduct(Real64 const Tdb){ Real64 const Tk = Tdb + Constant::Kelvin; Real64 const rho = 101325.0/(287.055*Tk); Real64 const cp = 1004.84; return rho*cp; }

name: SignedHeatFlux
cpp_unit: Real64 SignedHeatFlux(Real64 const U, Real64 const Tin, Real64 const Tout){ Real64 const dT = Tin - Tout; Real64 const q = U*std::abs(dT); return sign(q, dT); }
